subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto one among Our handmaidens, that My melodies may draw her unto the heaven of My knowledge and sever her from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی امه من امائی لتجذبها نغماتی الی سماء عرفانی و ینقطعها عن
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
